message:
feat(wezterm,sharding): WeztermInterface::list_panes_with_cx trait extension (ft-xbnl0.2.3)

Extends the `WeztermInterface` trait with a Cx-first `list_panes_with_cx`
default method, unblocking `sharding::collect_panes_with_cx` to actually
route through per-backend Cx-aware list_panes calls instead of the
ambient legacy path.

Scope:

1. crates/frankenterm-core/src/wezterm.rs (+23 src)

   a. `WeztermInterface::list_panes_with_cx` default method added.

      Signature:
        fn list_panes_with_cx<'a>(
            &'a self,
            _cx: &'a crate::cx::Cx,
        ) -> WeztermFuture<'a, Vec<PaneInfo>>

      Default implementation delegates to `list_panes()`. This is
      backward-compatible: all existing impls (Arc<dyn WeztermInterface>,
      UnifiedClient, MockWezterm, FailingMockWezterm) get the default
      without code changes.

   b. `WeztermClient` impl override.

      Overrides `list_panes_with_cx` to call
      `WeztermClient::list_panes_with_cx(self, cx)` (the concrete
      Cx-first method added in tick 19), which routes through
      `MuxPool::list_panes_with_cx` on the vendored+unix+asupersync
      fast path. On other configs, the concrete method itself falls
      back to the legacy CLI path.

2. crates/frankenterm-core/src/sharding.rs (+40 src, replacing previous
   list_all_panes_with_cx direct implementation)

   a. `collect_panes_with_cx(cx)` internal helper added.

      Mirrors the legacy `collect_panes` but uses
      `backend.handle.list_panes_with_cx(cx)` for each per-shard
      enumeration. Since `backend.handle: WeztermHandle` is
      `Arc<dyn WeztermInterface>` which now exposes
      `list_panes_with_cx` via the trait default (or WeztermClient's
      override), caller Cx threads all the way through to
      `MuxPool::list_panes_with_cx` on production shards.

   b. `list_all_panes_with_cx` updated.

      Now calls `collect_panes_with_cx(cx)` instead of the ambient
      `collect_panes()`. The `pane_routes.write_with_cx(cx)` for the
      route-map swap (from tick 26) is preserved.

Verification (CC=llvm clang, CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/ft-rusticmaple-target):

  * cargo test -p frankenterm-core --lib wezterm::: 160/160 pass
  * cargo test -p frankenterm-core --lib sharding::: 95/95 pass
  * cargo clippy -p frankenterm-core --lib -D warnings: clean
  * rustfmt --check: clean

Impact: this is the first WeztermInterface trait-level Cx-first
extension. It establishes a pattern for gradual trait migration:
default methods delegate to legacy, concrete impls override when a
Cx-first path exists. Follow-ups (get_text_with_cx,
pane_tiered_scrollback_summary_with_cx etc.) can land the same way.

Leaves ft-xbnl0.2.3 still in_progress.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
